elements.name: Description
texts:
Boat Island is in the Electoral Division of Pettigoe, in Civil Parish of Templecarn, in the Barony of Tirhugh, in the County of Donegal

Boat Island is an island.

Boat Island is on Logainm.ie: Boat Island.

Boat Island has an area of:

    7,900 m² / 0.79 hectares / 0.0079 km²
    0.00 square miles
    1.95 acres / 1 acre, 3 roods, 32 perches

Nationwide, it is the 60843rd largest townland that we know about

Within Co. Donegal, it is the 2685th largest townland
